title: Sort Table View Widget by Column

posts.author: dk_NFroehlich (Nils Fröhlich)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday-Team,

I use dashboards to quickly go through projects with clients, grabing info from several boards and filtering the info to the specific client.
Unfortunately while it is standard to sort the table views in normal boards, this function is missing entirely in the table widget.

Please add this.

posts.author: RyanBY (Ryan BY)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
have you heard back from the team/ found a way to do it?

posts.author: dk_NFroehlich (Nils Fröhlich)
posts.cookedHtml:
Unfortunately not.
But I would like to bump this topic.

posts.author: DannyP (Danny P)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be an amazing feature… any updates monday>?

posts.author: favioiraola (Favio De Iraola)
posts.cookedHtml: I also support the request to being able to Sort Table View Widget by Column, right now its just not useful to present data with no clear sorting, not even manual

posts.author: Ann-Katrin (Ann-Katrin Rueß)
posts.cookedHtml: Totally agree with everyone above @Monday: Right now, the dashboard is useless for us because of this!

posts.author: JackieGlavind (Jackie Glavind)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed, @Monday: this is a feature that needs to be added!

posts.author: Noelie2000 (Noel Pusey)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve see this in multiple feature requests but no feedback.

Seems like a very simple requirement to me, and necessary. Now that printing is almost impossible Dashboards are the only real solution and we can’t order the data.

Anyone seen any updates from Monday?

posts.author: Steven1 (Steven)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday team!

My team and I frequently use the table widget in our dashboards. For multiple examples, it would be very helpful to be able to sort by column within the widget. Currently, we can sort by column in the board, which then reflects in the widgets. However, this is not perfect, as we use the same board for various purposes where we need to sort by different columns for each purpose.

We would very much appreciate it if this could be addressed!

Kind regards,
Steven

posts.author: Emil (Emil)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday,

I was shocked to see we can’t sort data in the table widget. Please fix this!

Br. Emil

posts.author: aisaksson (Anna-Lena Isaksson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, we need sorting capabilities everywhere!
Please allow sorting in widgets!

posts.author: RMW66 (Roger Weaver)
posts.cookedHtml: Please update dashboard table view to have sorting, filtering and grouping just like board table view.

posts.author: julia.rybakME (Julia)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes please add this feature! Seems like a feature that should naturally be there already since the normal tables have the sort functions. But this is missing and it is quite frustrating.

posts.author: jjattwood (Josh Attwood)
posts.cookedHtml: How is this still not a feature, there have been requests for years!

posts.author: mmachino (Mike Machino)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes!!! A table widget sorting feature is an absolute MUST! Please add this ASAP.

posts.author: MickyMillion (Michael Million)
posts.cookedHtml: was VERY suprised it is not possible yet. Please add this feature.

posts.author: Shaun-Sparks (Shaun Sparks)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be so helpful for our organization! Please work on this!

posts.author: ManicMondayUser (John Mc)
posts.cookedHtml:
I honestly thought it was me when I was trying to set this up yesterday,
What do we all use dashboards and widget for? to simplify large boards and break out the relevant data we need to view, right!

Could you imagine creating a Pivot table in Excel and then not being able to sort it!

Its now 34 Months and counting… since the start of this topic and still no feedback.
So could I ask if its on the road-map, being looked in to or something that is not likely to be addressed in the near future.

**[poll type=multiple results=always min=1 max=1 public=false chartType=bar]

Request: To add ability to sort table inside of Dashboard Widgets

  • YES Definitely it’s a must
  • NO This feature is not necessary
    [/poll]
    **

posts.author: kanderso (Krissy)
posts.cookedHtml:
After browsing a ton of posts for this same feature, it’s looking like we’re not getting an update on this soon

Has anyone found a workaround to this? In particular, I am trying to sort by status in the table widget not board title.

posts.author: wenzday (wenzday)
posts.cookedHtml:
Need this.
Please at the very least have the widget retain the sorting from the parent table!!

posts.author: MaxKP (Max)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes please… and as almost everyone has already commented: hard to believe this isn’t a feature yet and has been ignored for 3+ years by now.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: will need a way to determine/choose which main table to use as you can have multiple different boards using that widget in a dashboard.

posts.author: wenzday (wenzday)
posts.cookedHtml: ah yes you’re right. But still sorting is like one of the main reasons to have a table. I am old enough to remember how bad some tables were 25-30 years ago but still they could be sorted by any of the columns. Hard to believe someone would make a table in 2025 that cannot be sorted.

posts.author: Aude (JjJ)
posts.cookedHtml: Any news on this ? This should be a basic function when using tables. Crossed fingers

posts.author: tomaz309 (Tom)
posts.cookedHtml: You’ve got vibe coding now @monday pleaseeeee

posts.author: PAulFx0x (Paul Farrell)
posts.cookedHtml:
Oh my word. I’ve just come in here as I too am having trouble sorting tables in a dashboard, and I’ve seen how long this thread has been going with no response from Monday.

As someone who works in Customer Success, I cannot believe they would leave their customers in the dark like this. If this happened in my company, people would be losing their job!

Very poor customer relationship. Makes me want to start looking at other solutions.

posts.author: dk_NFroehlich (Nils Fröhlich)
posts.cookedHtml: By now there is a workaround: Don’t use the table view but the List view. This is still in Beta and a bit buggy but if you take your time to set the list up, it works even better than the table view IMHO because you can summarise different columns into one and by that have an even better meta-view.

posts.author: lAMhUAN21 (hUAN)
posts.cookedHtml: I run dashboards across multiple boards as well, and lack of sorting in the table widget really slows down client reviews. Adding sort functionality would be a game changer.

posts.author: CRod (Christian Rodgiuez)
posts.cookedHtml: I can’t believe this is still not a feature! Bump this recommendation!!
